DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Target database name. Defaults to the modeled database name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Drop an existing target database before create/deploy.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Deploy metadata only and skip full processing.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Backup file path accessible to the Analysis Services service accounts.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Drop an existing target database before restore.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source Analysis Services server containing the processed database.
